name: protranslator
title: ProTranslator
description: Fix grammar, paraphrase, change tone, and continue text using multiple AI providers (OpenAI, Gemini, DeepSeek, Groq, or any OpenAI-compatible API).
author: quyen_nguyen_ngoc

commands.name: improve-selected-text
commands.title: Translator
commands.description: Refine, translate, fix grammar, and improve your text with AI.

arguments.name: text
arguments.placeholder: Type text to fix, translate, or rewrite...

commands.name: practice-vocab
commands.title: Practice Vocabulary
commands.description: Manage flashcards and practice your vocabulary.

commands.name: refine-inline
commands.title: Refine Inline
commands.description: Silently refine selected text to make it natural and clear, and replace it directly.

commands.name: quick-add-word
commands.title: Quick Add Word
commands.description: Quickly add selected text as a flashcard with AI definition.

preferences.name: provider
preferences.title: AI Provider
preferences.description: Choose which AI provider to use.

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: API Key
preferences.description: Your API key for the selected provider.

preferences.name: customBaseUrl
preferences.title: Custom Base URL
preferences.description: Base URL for custom OpenAI-compatible API (only used when provider is 'Custom').

preferences.name: customModel
preferences.title: Custom Model
preferences.description: Model name for custom provider (only used when provider is 'Custom').
